items.title: Rob Jetten becomes Netherlands' youngest ever PM
items.dek: The 38-year-old is sworn in as premier after clinching a narrow victory in October's election.
items.body: The 38-year-old is sworn in as premier after clinching a narrow victory in October's election.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Activists hang photo of former Prince Andrew in the Louvre after his arrest
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: What's at stake as ICC judges hear charges against ex-Philippine president Duterte?
items.dek: Duterte is accused of crimes against humanity during a long and bloody war on drugs in which thousands were killed.
items.body: Duterte is accused of crimes against humanity during a long and bloody war on drugs in which thousands were killed.
items.author: IriLine Desk
